name: Peach Cream Royale
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Freestone Peaches (Canned), drained and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crumbs and butter.
2. Press 1/3 of the crumb mixture firmly into the bottom of a 9 x 9-inch dish.
3. In a saucepan over low heat, cook the marshmallows with orange juice until melted. Allow to cool.
4. Stir in the peaches.
5. Whip the cream until almost stiff; fold the peach-marshmallow mixture into it.
6. Pour half of this mixture into the pan.
7. Cover with 1/3 of the crumb mixture.
8. Pour the remainder of the cream mixture over this and cover with the remaining crumb mixture.
9. Chill for at least 2 hours.
Serves: 9
